purpose: Record the focused Area & Explosives sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.canvasSpatialAutomation: Do not automate canvas geometry in this pass. Spatial targeting, template placement, line of sight, line of effect, and final affected targets remain metadata/advisory until a dedicated AoE workflow exists.
policy.autofireFeats: Autofire-based feats are modeled as riders on an autofire-capable attack instead of as independent attack systems.
policy.explosiveAreaFeats: Explosive/area feats remain advisory and may mutate damage only where the mutation is direct and selected by the user.

implementedEntries.name: Targeted Area
implementedEntries.mechanic: Attack option requiring area attack context. Adds +5 damage when selected. Target eligibility remains advisory/spatial.

implementedEntries.name: Spray Shot
implementedEntries.mechanic: Attack option requiring ranged autofire and area attack context. No canvas targeting automation.

implementedEntries.name: Flood of Fire
implementedEntries.mechanic: Attack option requiring ranged autofire and area attack context. Suppression/affected target geometry is advisory.

implementedEntries.name: Strafe
implementedEntries.mechanic: Attack option requiring ranged autofire context. Movement-line/path targeting is advisory.

implementedEntries.name: Forceful Blast
implementedEntries.mechanic: Attack option requiring area attack context. Blast positioning and forced movement remain advisory.

implementedEntries.name: Whirlwind Attack
implementedEntries.mechanic: Full-round melee area metadata. Reach and target selection remain advisory.

implementedEntries.name: Mobility
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores advisory +5 dodge bonus against movement-provoked attacks of opportunity for future AoO workflow context.

excludedEntries.name: Friendly Fire Avoidance
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.
